items.title: Elon Musk Posts Armie Hammer’s Controversial Comeback Film ‘Citizen Vigilante’ on X
items.summary: Elon Musk posted Armie Hammer’s “Citizen Vigilante” to his X account on Friday, sharing the controversial indie-actioner with his 240 million followers. The link was active for about 48 hours and went dark on Saturday. Directed and written by 60-year-old German filmmaker Uwe Boll, “Citizen Vigilante” was notably banned in his home country for depicting […]

Zayas vs. Ennis pay-per-view event takes place at Barclays Center in Brooklyn, New York. […]

items.summary: The cost of living is putting pressure on relationships – and preventing some couples from properly splitting upSign up for a weekly email featuring our best readsThe separate sleeping arrangement started seven years before the marriage finished. When Mary-Ann’s* hot flushes turned the bed into a furnace, her husband, Bill, moved into another bedroom. For the next two years there was some travel between the bedrooms for the purposes of intimacy.

items.title: The last continent: how deadly bird flu travelled the world before landing on a remote Australian beach

What does it mean for some of the world’s unique species?Get our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcastThis article contains images of dead wildlife. items.title: Noah Kahan Asks Concertgoers Not To Shit In Their Seats
items.summary: Yesterday Noah Kahan asked his fans to stop stealing his hometown's road sign, and now he's asking them to not shit their seats at his shows. Whereas Olivia Rodrigo recently made headlines after discussing concertgoers wearing adult diapers at her concerts in general admission, it seems Kahan's fans are somehow even worse. The post Noah Kahan Asks Concertgoers Not To Shit In Their Seats appeared first on Stereogum.
